Provides helper functions to access datasets from the Metropolitan
Transportation Authority (MTA) portion of the New York State Open Data
platform \<<https://data.ny.gov/>\>. Returns results as tidy tibbles
with support for optional filtering, sorting, and row limits through the
Socrata API.

# Package index

## Core functions

Main user-facing functions

- [`mta_list_datasets()`](https://martinezc1.github.io/mtaOpenData/reference/mta_list_datasets.md)
  : List datasets available in mtaOpenData
- [`mta_pull_dataset()`](https://martinezc1.github.io/mtaOpenData/reference/mta_pull_dataset.md)
  : Pull a MTA Open Data dataset from the MTA Open Data catalog
- [`mta_any_dataset()`](https://martinezc1.github.io/mtaOpenData/reference/mta_any_dataset.md)
  : Load Any MTA Open Data Dataset
